description: import * as ns; ns.foo marks foo as used -- only unaccessed members are unused

expectations.subject: src/utils.ts#foo
expectations.note: foo is accessed via utils.foo() -- it must be marked as used

expectations.subject: src/utils.ts#bar
expectations.note: bar is never accessed via the namespace -- it should be flagged as unused

expectations.subject: src/utils.ts
expectations.note: The file itself is imported via namespace import -- it is reachable
